title: Update Instagram social media link

requirements.text: Update the Instagram social media link in the Footer component to use the URL https://www.instagram.com/vedahealar/
acceptanceCriteria: The Instagram icon in the Footer links to https://www.instagram.com/vedahealar/
The link opens in a new tab with appropriate security attributes

requirements.text: Update the Instagram social media link in the Contact page to use the URL https://www.instagram.com/vedahealar/
acceptanceCriteria: The Instagram icon in the Contact page links to https://www.instagram.com/vedahealar/
The link opens in a new tab with appropriate security attributes

nonGoals: Changing any other social media links
Modifying the styling or appearance of social media icons
